  1. org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
Package
Description
io.spring
Single-step batch job sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
io.spring.cloud
Batch events sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
io.spring.configuration
Configuration classes for the multiple datasources sample application.
io.spring.taskobservations
Task observations sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
Interfaces for configuring Spring Cloud Task and a default implementations.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.support
Classes used for setting up and supporting a task repositories.
org.springframework.cloud.task.timestamp
Sample timestamp task application for Spring Cloud Task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by io.spring
    Class
    Description
    EnableTask
    Enables the TaskLifecycleListener so that the features of Spring Cloud Task will be applied.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by io.spring.cloud
    Class
    Description
    EnableTask
    Enables the TaskLifecycleListener so that the features of Spring Cloud Task will be applied.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by io.spring.configuration
    Class
    Description
    DefaultTaskConfigurer
    Default implementation of the TaskConfigurer interface.
    TaskConfigurer
    Provides a strategy interface for providing configuration customization to the task system.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by io.spring.taskobservations
    Class
    Description
    EnableTask
    Enables the TaskLifecycleListener so that the features of Spring Cloud Task will be applied.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
    Class
    Description
    SingleInstanceTaskListener
    When spring.cloud.task.single-instance-enabled is set to true this listener will create a lock for the task based on the spring.cloud.task.name.
    TaskConfigurer
    Provides a strategy interface for providing configuration customization to the task system.
    TaskObservationCloudKeyValues
    Provides values for the KeyValues for the task Observation when the cloud profile is active.
    TaskProperties
    Properties available to configure the task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
    Class
    Description
    TaskObservationCloudKeyValues
    Provides values for the KeyValues for the task Observation when the cloud profile is active.
    TaskProperties
    Properties available to configure the task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.support
    Class
    Description
    TaskProperties
    Properties available to configure the task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration used by org.springframework.cloud.task.timestamp
    Class
    Description
    EnableTask
    Enables the TaskLifecycleListener so that the features of Spring Cloud Task will be applied.
